summary: Phase 2 frontend-only acceptance testing completed via Playwright against the live preview URL. All 13 acceptance criteria from the review request PASS: exactly 2 ratio cards (YouTube 16:9 + Instagram 9:16) with auto-advance to /brand on click, exactly 3 color picker groups (color-primary/secondary/highlight) each with swatch + color-*-hex text input, live preview updates instantly for primary bg / headline highlight / secondary text, HEX inputs accept both '0E1F1C' and '#0E1F1C', invalid hex (ZZZZZZ) does not crash and last valid color is retained, exactly 2 font options (font-option-times + font-option-gotham), counterpart-keyword-font logic correct (Gotham main -> 'Times New Roman Italic' keyword and vice versa), selected font shows check icon, brand-preview-headline and brand-preview-body inline style both contain 'letter-spacing: -2px', brand-reset-button (and brand-quick-reset) restore defaults (primary=#0A0A0B, secondary=#FAFAFA, highlight=#E4B8A0, mainFont=times), localStorage key 'broll.studio.v2' persists primary HEX (#123456) + mainFont (gotham) across reload, sidebar nav-step-ratio shows completed checkmark after ratio selection, step-prev-button on /brand returns to /ratio and step-next-button advances to /script, no JS console errors (only React devtools info log). Expected 404 for /fonts/Gotham-BookItalic.woff2 was not even observed in this run because the font isn't requested by the preview text in current viewport.
critical_code_review_comments: ColorPickerInput.jsx — handleHexChange auto-prepends '#' on every keystroke including paste; works but means typing '#0E1F1C' produces an intermediate '##' state momentarily. Cosmetic only, no functional bug.

BrandDeck.jsx — `<input type='color'>` is positioned with w-0 h-0 + opacity-0; native picker still opens via the parent button's openPicker() call. Verified working but slightly fragile across browsers (Safari may ignore programmatic click on color inputs).
ProjectContext.jsx — silent empty catch blocks on localStorage read/write. Same comment as iteration 1; minor.
seed_data_creation: none — localStorage was cleared before each scenario run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 fully verified end-to-end with Playwright on https://ai-broll-gen.preview.emergentagent.com. Key observations confirmed: storage key is 'broll.studio.v2'; sidebar uses data-testid='nav-step-{slug}' (NOT step-item-X); ratio auto-advance fires ~380ms after click; brand-preview, brand-preview-headline, brand-preview-body, brand-preview-eyebrow, brand-swatches, keyword-font-name, keyword-font-readout testids all present and live-bound. The ratio cards use testids 'ratio-card-16-9' and 'ratio-card-9-16' (the colon in ratio IDs is replaced with a hyphen in testid). FontSelector renders <Check> icon (lucide-check svg class) when selected. No console errors observed. Phase 1 nested-button issue in SceneEditorCard already fixed by main agent in this iteration (not re-tested here as out of scope, but no console errors fired on /brand which was the scope).
rca of the issue: No bugs found in Phase 2 scope.
